hero.title: Advanced research for a sustainable future
hero.subtitle1: «National Center for Seismological Observations and Research» is the leading organization of the Republic of Kazakhstan in the field of seismology, geophysics, and seismic hazard forecasting.
labs1: Laboratory of Geodynamic and Seismic Processes
labs5: Laboratory of the Earth's Crust Fluid Regime
labs6: Laboratory of Deep Structure of the Earth's Crust
labs8: Laboratory of Seismic Resistance of Buildings and Structures
labs9: Laboratory of Remote Sensing of the Earth and Cartography
service.sub: Our center provides comprehensive scientific and technical services to government bodies, research institutions, and private clients. We combine advanced technologies with many years of experience.
service1: Assessment of seismic risk (engineering and social) for settlements located in seismically hazardous areas of the Republic of Kazakhstan
Development of seismic risk maps for settlements located in seismically hazardous areas of the Republic of Kazakhstan
Macroseismic surveys of territories to assess the consequences of occurred earthquakes

Technical inspection of the reliability and stability of buildings and structures at facilities of the first and second responsibility levels, as well as building certification with the issuance of an expert conclusion
serviceblock1: Contact our specialists to discuss your project requirements and receive a tailored solution.
